message:
docs(security): document dispatch security standard at StartSession

Adds security standard comment at StartSession — the central point where all
flag values reach the spawn command string. Documents allowlist + ShellQuote
standard, looksLikeBeadID enforcement, and HTTP dispatch pre-conditions.

Closes #3112

Co-Authored-By: Chris Deal <cdeal@mines.edu>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
